calendar.matters:
Petition For Reformation And Modification Of The Stephen Zellerbach Living Trust
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Hartog for Cecile Zellerbach (Petitioner).

Mr. Hartog presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the proposed reformation and modification of the Trust. The Court expressed it's concerns with regard to the impact the changes will have on the Grandchildren's Trust (GST Trust) and proposed that Cecile Zellerbach be made a Beneficiary of the GST Trust with discretionary income rather than mandatory income. The Court also stated that it is not agreeable to the requested change in the accounting method. Mr. Hartog is to provide a letter to the Court indicating why his proposed reformation is more efficient and effective, and better suited than the one proposed by the Court. The letter is also to address why the Court should consider the requested change in the accounting method. The matter was taken under submission (subject to receipt and review of the letter).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
